---
name: Feature request / new AI tell
about: Suggest a guidance improvement, a new AI tell, or a scanner pattern
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The gap**
What pattern, rule, or example is missing or unclear today?

**Proposed change**
What should the skill say or do?

**Before / after (if it's a writing pattern)**
> Before: ...
>
> After: ...

**Why it reads as machine-written / why it matters**
Briefly explain the reasoning, so the guidance stays principled rather than a
growing blocklist.
